title: Candidate-Option Scoring Rubric v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide expanded-access guidance for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Scores mean public review readiness only, not clinical priority, expected benefit, safety, feasibility, or patient fit.
Does not compare, rank, or select candidate options for a person.
Requires qualified clinician, site, sponsor, regulatory, institutional, and privacy review where applicable before any real-world use.
Does not permit real case data, patient-specific candidate options, identifiers, raw records, dates tied to a person, images, or free-text notes in the public repo.
